title: rubus brachycladus
intro: Rubus brachycladus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Rubus brachycladus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus brachycladus can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
